text: Nsuo fitaa bi firi wɔn ase ba.
ref: there is whitish water color coming from their vagina.
translated: Some water fell from them

text: Deɛ nti a ɛte saa ne sɛ, sohyia midia rekyerɛ mmabunu dodoɔ no ara ɔbra a aporɔ na ɛmfata Ɔkani ba.
ref: This is because, social media is training the most of the youths a life which doesn't fit an Akan child.
translated: Therefore, since it is like that, the gathering is becoming all kinds of people, and hard work is not suitable for a child.

text: Ɛtɔ da mpo a, na wɔtumi de nkyene gu mu toto we no saa ara.
ref: Sometimes it could even be eaten with salt in the same way.
translated: Even if it happens every day, they can put pepper in it and taste it just like that.

text: Saa dwumadie yi kɔɔ so ara nyinieε ama mpo εnnε wokɔ aman ahodoɔ so na wobɔ saa dwumadie no din a afoforɔ bεhunu dwumadie korɔ.
ref: This service continued to grow so that even today you go to different countries and mention the name of the service that others will see the same service.
translated: This work has become so established that even today you go to various nations and call this work by a name that others consider a single work.

text: Sɛ saa nnipa baanu yi bu wɔn ani gu wei so ware a, mmɔfra baanan a wɔbɛwo biara mu no, ɛmu baanu gyɛnotaopo bɛyɛ AS (deɛ ɛho ate kyema kakra), na baanu a aka no nso deɛ ayɛ SS (deɛ ate kyema pa ara).
ref: If these people get married, with all the four children they will produce, two of them will have AS genotype ( half defect), and the other two will be SS ( full defect).
translated: If these two people get married and have children, the four children that will be born to each of them, their two sets of quadruplets will be AS (which is slightly above average), and the two that are left will also be SS (which is excellent).

text: Ԑno nti, ԑhia pa ara sԑ wode nnuane a ԑbԑboa ama w’adene no asi pi asi ta bԑka wo nnuane ho.
ref: That is why it is very essential to include foods that helps the brain in your diet.
translated: Therefore, it is very important that the food which helps their bodies to develop properly complements your food.

text: Kane a na akuafoɔ mfa nnuro ngugu wɔn nsase ne wɔn nnɔbaeɛ so no, na wɔtumi nya nhabamma, atosodeɛ ne nnuaba binom di de sa wɔn ho yareɛ.
ref: In the past, farmers did not apply pesticides to their lands and crops, and they could eat certain vegetables, fruits, and herbs for healing
translated: When farmers use chemical fertilizers on their soil and surroundings, they can obtain nutrients, proteins and carbohydrates to consume to protect their bodies from illness.

text: Sԑ mfidie mu nkanea ne ᴐhyew kᴐ obi mu pii a, ᴐnya ayamkuro.
ref: If too much outdoor light and heat gets into a person, he gets a cold.
translated: If there is a lot of heat in the afternoon in the room, you get cold.

text: Afei nso, sɛ wohunu hankɛkyifu a bese, nkosua, aburo, ɛmo ne nneɛma binom a ɛtete saa gugu soɔ wɔ nkwantannan so a, na ɛreka sɛ obi abɛyi ne tiri mmusuo.
ref: Another sign of a ritual to banish ill luck was a handkerchief placed near a four-way intersection containing kola nuts, eggs, corn, rice, and other similar foods.
translated: Moreover, if you see hungry people, gifts, corn, children and some things that are wrapped on that bundle on the road, it means someone will go wash his/her head.

text: Yei nti, na wɔde yɛ nkwan binom te sɛ abunuabunu ne abɛnkwan.
ref: For this reason, it was used in some dishes such as bread and butter.
translated: Therefore, they make various kinds of food such as fufu and palm nut soup.

text: Wei na yɛfrɛ no sɛ kooko no.
ref: This is what is referred to as piles.
translated: This is called corn

text: Nsɛnkyerɛnne a ɛkasa a anka yɛde di dwuma kane no nhyɛ da nni hɔ bio nanso ɛnkyerɛ sɛ wɔmfa nni dwuma koraa bio.
ref: Nonverbal communication that was used in the past is not really there anymore; however, that does not mean that it is no longer in use.
translated: The signs that spoke, which we used for work before, no longer exist today, but it shows that they should not have any work at all.

text: Ɛnnɛ nso, nnipa binom ahyɛ da afa abɛɛfo kwan so ayɛ mfuo a wɔde yɛn akɔkono tɔn ma nkurɔfoɔ kɔtɔ di.
ref: Today, some people have used technology to make farms for palm weevil larvae production where people go and buy from.
translated: Moreover, some people have followed the path of the wicked and do works with which they sell their souls to be consumed by people.

text: Kae sɛ, saa yadeɛ a yɛreka ho asɛm yi nka nyarewa a yɛnya firi nna mu nkitahodie mu, ɛfiri sɛ ɔbaa bi bɛtumi anya yadeɛ yi wɔ berɛ a ɔne barima biara nhyiaa wɔ nna mu da.
ref: remember that, this disease that we are talking about is not part of sexually transmitted diseases, because a woman can contract this disease even when she had not had any sexual affair with any man.
translated: Remember that this story we are telling is a tragedy that comes from daily experiences, because a woman can experience this whenever she meets any man in her daily life.

text: Afei te asikyire nnuanedie nso so. Yei ne kakra a yɛbɛtumi asua afa dwonsɔtoa a ɛkyi nsuo no ahonhono ho.
ref: Then sit on the asikyire diet as well. Here is a little we can learn about the inflammation of the urinary tract.
translated: Now, regarding the topic of food crops again. This is a little that we can learn about the harmful effects of chemical fertilizers that contaminate water.

text: Ɔbaapanin no de ne nsateaa akyerɛkyerɛkwan no di kan bɔ nsa no mu de ka abɔfra no kɛtrɛma so ka sɛ, "Asomasi (Ɔbɔ abɔfra no din a wɔde ato dwa no frɛ no), wohunu sɛ ɛyɛ nsa a, ka sɛ nsa na nse sɛ ɛyɛ nsuo."
ref: the old woman dips her finger in the alcohol and use it to touch the tongue of the child and say if u see alcohol say alcohol don't say its water.
translated: The elder first uses his wisdom to explain by dipping his hand and placing the child on his knee saying, "Asomasi (the name given to the child during the naming ceremony), you see that it is wine, say that it is wine but it tastes like water."

text: Ɛnnε, yεnhunu saa nneεma yinom nyinaa bio εfiri sε yεmfa saa mmara no nyε adwuma seesei.
ref: Today, we don't see all these things because we no longer abiding by these laws.
translated: Now, we shall see all these things again, since we are not using that law to work now.

text: Wotumi hwɛ w'adidie mu yie na wodi nnuane pa a, ɛbɛboa ama w'adwene no ayɛ adwuma yie ɛfiri sɛ, wobɛtumi asusu nneɛma ho yie na wobɛtumi nso akae nneɛma ntɛm.
ref: Being able to control your diet and eat healthy foods will help your mind to work better because you will be able to think clearly and remember things faster.
translated: You can look carefully at your diet and eat good food that will help your brain work well because you will be able to concentrate on things well and you will also be able to remember things quickly.

text: Abᴐdeε mu nyansapε adesua kyerε sε, mframa a εfiri nnua ne aduadeε mu no na nnipa home kᴐ ne mu, na nnua ne aduadeε nso ahome deε nnipa home ba abᴐntene no.
ref: Scientific study shows that the air from trees and plants is breathed in by humans, and the air from humans is breathed in by trees and plants.
translated: Science education in the home teaches that the wind from trees and plants, into which people's breath goes, and trees and plants also release something to which people's breath returns.

text: Nanso ayamtim a aba onipa bi so atenaseε na ayε sε yadeε koankorᴐ no kyerε sε, akwaa no ahodoᴐ a εboa yam aduane a yεdie no ma no yε adwuma no nyε adwuma sεdeε anka εsε sε εyε.
ref: However, the presence of constipation as a chronic disease means that the various organs that help digestion are not working as they should.
translated: However, we have been considering what has suddenly happened to some people, and it is that old age shows that the child's abilities that help gather our food do not work as they should.

text: Sɛ ɛkɔba no saa a agye sɛ ɔsoa nneɛma no wɔ n’apampam de kɔ dwa so anaa de kɔ fie.
ref: If that happens he has to carry the items on his shoulders to the market or home.
translated: If the lizard is like that, it is certain that the one carrying the items is on his/her back going to the farm or home.

text: Afei sɛdeɛ na wɔde ntoma binom bu nnipa binom bɛ no so ate, obi de ntoma no fɛ na ɛfira, na mmom ɛnyɛ ne din.
ref: Also, the art of communicating with someone using symbols from the prints in a cloth has reduced; people wear the cloth based on how nice it is, not its name.
translated: Now how two letters are used to overcome two people, someone loves the letter and it perishes, but it is not his name.

text: Mogya a nananom hwie guiɛ nya de too hɔ maa yɛn
ref: The blood shed by the ancestors got laid down for us
translated: The blood that our ancestors shed and got and put there for us

text: Kyɛ ma afoforɔ nso nhunu saa mfasoɔ yinom bi.
ref: Share for others to benefit from these vital information.
translated: And let others also see these benefits.

text: Megye di sɛ woahunu sɛ mfasoɔ bebree wɔ bragorɔ so pa ara.
ref: Certainly, the rite of menarche holds significant benefits for young women and you will agree with me as well
translated: It's very good, with many benefits.

text: Wɔn nnyesoɔ ne “Ofori-na”, anaa “Ofoona”.
ref: their response is "Ofori-na' or "Ofoona".
translated: Their example is Ofori-na, or Ofoona.

text: Ↄde kaa ho sɛ, ɛho hia nso sɛ aban no boa wɔn a wɔyɛ nneɛma no sɛdeɛ ɛbɛyɛ a wɔbɛtumi ayɛ nneɛma a ɛsom bo pa ara a yɛbɛtumi de amane aman afoforɔ ama mfasoɔ aba so ama ɔman no na ɔman no agye din wɔ wiase aman nyinaa dwa so.
ref: He added that it is also important for the government to support the manufacturing sector to develop a competitive export product that will be able to compete on the international market.
translated: With all due respect, it is also important that the government helps those who do business in such a way that they can conduct business that serves the greater good, which we can use to bring benefits from other nations for the country, and the country will gain respect worldwide.

text: Hyɛ no nso sɛ mmɔfra taa nya wɔn resose mogya firi wɔn agyanom hɔ, sɛ ɛyɛ 'positive' anaa 'negative'.
ref: Note thar, children mostly get their resource blood from their fathers, either positive or negative.
translated: It is also important that children often get their blood type from their parents, whether it is 'positive' or 'negative'.

text: Ↄkasamafo no daa no adi sɛ, sɛ wɔwie saa akwankyerɛ yi a, wɔde ɛho asɛm bɛba abɛto wɔn nyinaa anim ama wɔasi gyinaeɛ.
ref: The Speaker further clarified that once the Adhoc committee completes its investigation, the findings will be presented to the entire house for a collective decision to be made on the matter.
translated: Those idle ones will come to know that when they finish this race, they will bring disgrace upon all of them, causing them to stand in regret.

text: Ɛno nti, ɛho hia pa ara sɛ yɛtaa di mmire.
ref: Therefore, it is very important to eat millet regularly.
translated: That's why it's really important that we eat vegetables regularly.

text: Amanebɔ a Asoeɛ a Kuayɔ ho Nsɛm so no de bɛtoo dwa kyerɛɛ mu sɛ, atirimpɔ a wɔde abue saa dwa yi nyinaa ne sɛ ɛbɛboa ama nnuane boɔ a ahuri kɔ soro wɔ ɔman yi mu no bɛtumi aba fam sɛdeɛ mmoborɔfoɔ ne wɔn a wɔn nsam nhyɛda nni bi no nyinaa bɛnya wɔn so ne wɔn deɛ atɔ.
ref: The report released by the Ministry of Agriculture explained that the overall objective of the opening of these markets is to help bring down the soaring food prices in this country as the poor and the underprivileged all who do not have it will have theirs on them and theirs will be bought.
translated: The Alliance of the United and Defense Committee on the matter has taken a position to indicate that the intention with which they opened all these doors is that it will help the food production that has been rising in this country to come down so that the poor and those who have no one to rely on will all benefit from it and their share.

text: Ԑsԑ sԑ onipa no te nnuro a wᴐde te yaw biara soᴐ no so.
ref: The person should stay on any pain medication.
translated: It is that the person who is in suffering bears every pain on every matter.

text: Asɛm no kae sɛ wɔn a wonnim akenkan ne akyerɛw no mu ɔpepem 4.6 yɛ mmea na ɔpepem 3.3 yɛ mmarima, na ɛkyerɛ sɛ mmea wɔ ɔhaw bi a na ɛkɔ so tra hɔ bere tenten.
ref: The news stated that 4.6 million of the illiterate are women and 3.3 million are men, this shows that women have some challenges which can last long.
translated: The report says that among those who cannot read and write, 4.6 million are women and 3.3 million are men, and this shows that women are in some hardship that continues to exist for a long time.

text: Woyɛ ɔbarima? Ɛnneɛ saa apɔmuden adesua yi ho hia wo  papaapa.
ref: Are you a man? Then this exercise is very important to you
translated: Are you a man? Today this science education is very important for you.

text: Sɛ yɛhwɛ mu a, Aisha Huang opeemu no ankasa deɛ, NPP mu nnipa titire, Nkrabea Effah Dartey na ↄregyina n’afa adi n’asɛm no.
ref: In fact, Aisha Huang's appeal itself is being defended by NPP figure, Nkrabea Effah Dartey.
translated: If we look closely, Aisha Huang's own people, especially NPP members like Nkrabea Effah Dartey, are leading the matter.

text: Atadwe yε aduadeε a wᴐdii kwan duaa no wᴐ Egypt no mu baako.
ref: Tiger nuts is one of the first crops to be grown in Egypt.
translated: We are the group that traveled the ten roads in Egypt as one.

text: Ɛsɛ sɛ woyɛ yei berɛ a woremma no ntwetwe w'adwene mfiri nneɛma a ɛho hia pa ara woresusu ho no so.
ref: You need to do this while not letting it distract you from the more important things you are thinking about.
translated: You should do this without rushing, thinking carefully about very important matters.

text: Obi wu patuwuo a, Akanfoɔ gye di sɛ wato ne kɔn awu nti wɔyɛ no ayi pa.
ref: When someone dies unprepared, Akans believe that he has locked his neck dead so they give him a good funeral.
translated: When a person dies suddenly, the Akan people believe that because of the cause of death, they perform funeral rites.

text: Nsɛnkyerɛnneɛ bɛn na ɛbɛda adi ama obi ahunu sɛ ɔwɔ ayamtim?
ref: What are the symptoms of constipation?
translated: What sign will appear for someone to see that they are in trouble?

text: Deɛ ɛteɛ ne sɛ, prɛkɛsɛ yɛ aduaba bi a ɛtu hua yie, na sɛ obi de reyɛ aduane na wonam akyiri koraa a wotumi te.
ref: The fact is that the Aidan fruit is one that has a strong scent; therefore, the aroma from food being prepared with it can be sensed from quite a distance away.
translated: The truth is that we should bake a cake that tastes very good, and if someone brings food and eats it greedily, they can eat it.

text: Ɛsiane yei nti, sɛ wowe karɔto a, ɛmma ɛkɔm nne wo ntɛm.
ref: For this reason, eating carrots prevents you from feeling hungry quickly.
translated: Because of this, if you are a carrot, it will come to you tomorrow.

text: Animdefoɔ kyerɛ sɛ, ahoɔdennuro bi a wɔfrɛ no Omega 3 fati ased wɔ salmɔn mu a ɛboa apemfoɔ nipadua pa ara.
ref: Experts says that salmon contains Omega 3 fatty acid which is very helpful for the body of pregnant women..
translated: Research shows that a certain fatty acid called Omega 3 found in salmon is very beneficial to the body.

text: Owura Sarpong a wↄde saa kwaadu yi abↄ no no gyee apoobↄ nsɛm a wↄaka afa ne ho sɛ ↄyɛ no nyinaa too mu.
ref: Mr Sarpong who was found guilty accepted all the fraud cases on him.
translated: Master Sarpong, who used this method, received the important news concerning himself that it was all compiled.

text: Wɔsan kyerɛ sɛ, aduaneduro bi a wɔfrɛ no folate nso ahyɛ no ma, na saa aduaneduro yi boa ɔpemfoɔ no ne abɔfra a ɔhyɛ yafunu mu no nyinaa.
ref: It is also said to be rich in folate, which helps both the pregnant woman and the unborn child.
translated: We also show that a certain food item called folate is harmful, and this food item helps all the elderly and children suffering from malnutrition.

text: Ansa na Asanteman rebɛkɔ ɔko yi no, Ɔkɔmfo Anɔkye hwɛɛ pɛtɛtakra mu.
ref: Before the Asanteman went to this battle, the Wizard of the Morning looked into the peat.
translated: Before Asanteman went to this war, Okomfo Anokye looked in the palm of his hand.

text: Mpaneɛ no bi bɛtumi ayɛ deɛ ɛbɛbɔ wo ho ban afiri papuu, ntoburo, atiridii ne nyarewa afoforɔ ho.
ref: Some of the vaccinations can be used to protect you from flu, measles, malaria and other diseases.
translated: Some people can be a source of protection for you from dangers, accidents, injuries, and other diseases.

text: Sԑ wɔpɔre nnuaba ho a, wɔtwe ԑmu nnepa no ne deԑ ԑboa nipadua no firi mu.
